title: Trump says China has agreed not to send weapons to Iran
summary_full: The president made the claim, which Beijing has yet to confirm, amid anger in China that its vessels could be caught up in a U.S. blockade targeting Iranian ports.
summary_public: The president made the claim, which Beijing has yet to confirm, amid anger in China that its vessels could be caught up in a U.S. blockade targeting Iranian ports.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: China has agreed not to send weapons to Iran
